channel.title: Review of Economics
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Review of Economics

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Dominik Maltritz, Sebastian Wüste DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/roe-2024-frontmatter2

item.description: Article by Dominik Maltritz, Sebastian Wüste DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/roe-2024-0005

item.title: Heat Exposure and Birth Weight
item.description: Article by Dominik Maltritz, Sebastian Wüste DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/roe-2024-0036

item.title: Creative Accounting and Fiscal Rules in EU Member States: An Analysis Based on Stock Flow Adjustments
item.description: Article by Dominik Maltritz, Sebastian Wüste DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/roe-2024-0031
